name: Strawberry Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, lightly beat the eggs. Mix in the oil and sugar, then sourdough.
2. Add the flour and baking soda. Stir until the flour is just blended.
3. Fold in the strawberries and walnuts. Do not overblend; the bread may be tough if overmixed.
4. Butter and lightly flour an 8 x 4 1/2 inch loaf pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake on the center rack of the oven for 1 hour and 20 minutes at 350°F.
6. Turn out onto a wire rack to cool.
7. Cut and serve. This is delicious with Sunday Morning Brunch, served warm with fresh strawberry jam or strawberries and whipped cream.
